items.description: Channel membership with channel_id, user_id, role, joined_at, notification_level. Primary key: (channel_id, user_id).
items.title: Table: Channel Members

items.description: Direct message conversations with id, workspace_id, participants (jsonb), group_name, is_group, created_at. Index on workspace_id.
items.title: Table: Dm Conversations

items.description: Thread data with parent_message_id, reply_count, resolved, last_reply_at. Index on parent_message_id.
items.title: Table: Message Threads

items.description: Emoji reactions with message_id, user_id, emoji, created_at. Primary key: (message_id, user_id, emoji).
items.title: Table: Message Reactions

items.description: User profiles with user_id, workspace_id, email, username, status, bio, avatar_url, timezone. Unique index on (workspace_id, email).
items.title: Table: Workspace Users

items.description: Real-time presence with user_id, workspace_id, status (online/offline/away), last_activity_at. No indices (TTL-based cleanup).
items.title: Table: User Presence

items.description: Read status with message_id, user_id, read_at. Composite index on (message_id, user_id).
items.title: Table: Message Read Receipts

items.description: Message edit history with message_id, version, content, edited_by, edited_at. Index on message_id.
items.title: Table: Message Versions

items.description: Security audit with id, workspace_id, user_id, action, resource_type, timestamp. Indices on workspace_id, user_id, action.
items.title: Table: Audit Log

items.description: Invite links with id, channel_id, invite_code, created_by, expires_at, one_time_use, used_count. Index on invite_code.
items.title: Table: Channel Invites

items.description: Workspace user roles with user_id, workspace_id, role (admin/member/guest), created_at. Primary key: (user_id, workspace_id).
items.title: Table: Workspace Members

items.description: Workspace metadata with id, name, logo_url, domain, plan, created_at, settings (jsonb).
items.title: Table: workspaces

items.description: React component for rendering individual messages with avatar, username, timestamp, edited indicator, reactions, and actions menu. Supports rich text rendering.
items.title: MessageBubble Component

items.description: Enable instant message delivery using WebSocket connections with fallback to polling for clients without WebSocket support. Messages must be delivered with sub-second latency for optimal user experience.
items.title: Real-time Message Delivery

items.description: Implement persistent message storage with full-text search capabilities, archival policies for old messages, and recovery mechanisms for deleted messages within 30-day window.
items.title: Message History and Archival

items.description: Allow users to edit messages within 5 minutes of posting and delete messages with audit trail. Show "edited" indicator and maintain message version history for compliance.
items.title: Message Editing and Deletion

items.description: Support markdown, code blocks, inline code, bold, italic, strikethrough, and link previews. Enable users to format messages with embedded images and video previews.
items.title: Rich Text Message Formatting

items.description: Implement emoji picker with search, custom emoji uploads, and reaction aggregation. Users can react to messages with multiple emojis and see reaction counts.
items.title: Emoji and Reaction System

items.description: Show real-time typing indicators when users are composing messages with automatic timeout after 3 seconds of inactivity.
items.title: Typing Indicators

items.description: Display read status for messages with timestamp of when each user read the message. Support bulk read receipt updates for performance.
items.title: Message Read Receipts

items.description: Users can create public and private channels with customizable names, descriptions, and topic. Admins can archive, delete, or restore channels with audit logging.
items.title: Channel Creation and Management

items.description: Allow channel owners to add/remove members, set member roles (owner, moderator, member), and define permissions per role. Support invite links with expiration.
items.title: Channel Membership Management

items.description: Configure per-channel notification settings: all messages, mentions only, or mute. Support notification scheduling and do-not-disturb hours.
items.title: Channel Notifications

items.description: Enable searching channels by name, description, and member count with filtering by type (public/private). Show popular channels and recommendations.
items.title: Channel Search and Discovery

items.description: Implement channel moderation with post approval, message filtering, spam detection, and user muting/banning. Support moderation audit logs.
items.title: Channel Moderation Tools

items.description: Store and retrieve threaded DM conversations with proper indexing.
items.title: DM Thread Management

items.description: Track channel activity metrics: message volume, active members, peak hours, and engagement trends. Generate reports for channel health.
items.title: Channel Analytics and Metrics

items.description: Enable one-on-one and group direct messages with conversation history and participants list. Support DM groups with up to 20 participants.
items.title: Direct Message Conversations

items.description: Show online/offline status, typing indicators, and last seen timestamp. Deliver notifications for new DMs even when user is offline.
items.title: DM Notifications and Presence

items.description: Allow users to add/remove members from group DMs, change group name and avatar. Support admin controls for DM groups.
items.title: DM Group Management

items.description: Search across all DM conversations by participant name, message content, or date range. Support filtering and pinned conversations.
items.title: DM Search and Filter

items.description: Enable threaded replies to keep conversations organized. Users can reply to specific messages creating a thread without cluttering main channel.
items.title: Thread Reply System

items.description: Automatically subscribe reply authors to threads. Support @mentions in threads and separate notification settings for thread replies.
items.title: Thread Notifications and Subscriptions

items.description: Show thread preview with message count and latest reply in main channel. Display full thread context when viewing thread details.
items.title: Thread Context and Preview

items.description: Allow users to mark threads as resolved/unresolved for task tracking. Archive resolved threads with easy recovery option.
items.title: Resolved Threads

items.description: Support @mentions for individual users with autocomplete, @channel for all members, and @here for active online users. Show mentioned users in message metadata.
items.title: @Mention System

items.description: Centralized notification hub with categories: mentions, replies, direct messages, channel activity. Support notification batching and digest emails.
items.title: Notification Management

items.description: Per-channel, per-conversation, and global notification settings. Support quiet hours, priority filtering, and notification grouping by thread.
items.title: Notification Preferences

items.description: Show badge on bell icon with unread mention count. Display mention history with search and filter capabilities.
items.title: Mention History and Bell Icon

items.description: Support file uploads up to 2GB with drag-and-drop, progress indicators, and pause/resume. Organize files in channel-specific libraries with metadata.
items.title: File Upload and Management

items.description: Preview images, PDFs, videos, and code files inline. Support syntax highlighting for code with multiple language detection.
items.title: File Preview and Rendering

items.description: Share files with specific users or channels with access control. Support download restrictions and expiring share links.
items.title: File Sharing and Permissions

items.description: Full-text search in uploaded documents, filter by file type and date. Support file tagging and custom collections.
items.title: File Search and Organization

items.description: Track file versions with rollback capability. Show change history and who modified files and when.
items.title: File Version Control

items.description: Customizable user profiles with avatar, bio, location, and social links. Support status messages like "In a meeting" with auto-clear timers.
items.title: User Profiles and Status

items.description: Organization-wide user directory with search by name, email, department. Support advanced filtering by role, location, and team.
items.title: User Search and Directory

items.description: Real-time presence tracking: online, idle, offline, away. Support automatic status based on inactivity and calendar integration.
items.title: Presence and Availability

items.description: Organization and workspace-level roles: Admin, Moderator, Member, Guest. Define granular permissions per role.
items.title: User Roles and Permissions

items.description: Create organizational hierarchies with teams and departments. Support team-specific channels and permissions.
items.title: Team and Department Management

items.description: Guided setup for new users with profile creation, workspace orientation, and team assignments. Send welcome emails with invitations.
items.title: User Onboarding Workflow

items.description: Fast full-text search across all messages with advanced filters: from, before, after, in channel. Support regex patterns and saved searches.
items.title: Full-Text Message Search

items.description: Allow users to save favorite searches with custom names. Support smart filters based on usage patterns and recommendations.
items.title: Saved Searches and Filters

items.description: Track trending search terms and popular topics. Show related search results and common questions.
items.title: Search Analytics and Trending

items.description: One-on-one and group voice/video calls with crystal-clear audio quality. Support up to 500 participants in group calls with adaptive bitrate.
items.title: Voice and Video Calls

items.description: Share entire screen, specific application, or browser tab with low latency. Support multi-presenter mode and annotation tools.
items.title: Screen Sharing

items.description: Record calls with consent from all participants. Automatic speech-to-text transcription with speaker identification and searchable transcripts.
items.title: Call Recording and Transcription

items.description: Schedule calls with calendar invites. Support timezone conversion and meeting reminders.
items.title: Call Scheduling and Calendar Integration

items.description: Apply background blur, custom backgrounds, and visual effects during video calls. Support brand backgrounds for corporate use.
items.title: Virtual Backgrounds and Effects

items.description: Extensible plugin architecture for third-party integrations. Built-in integrations for GitHub, Jira, Google Drive, Trello, and Asana.
items.title: Slack App Marketplace

items.description: Outgoing webhooks for custom integrations. Send events on message, channel, or user actions to external systems.
items.title: Webhook Support

items.description: Easy bot creation with command parsing, message handling, and response generation. Support natural language processing for intelligent bots.
items.title: Bot Framework

items.description: OAuth 2.0 support for third-party apps. Generate and manage API keys for programmatic access.
items.title: OAuth and API Authentication

items.description: No-code automation platform with triggers (message, channel, schedule) and actions (send message, create channel, notify).
items.title: Workflow Automation Engine

items.description: Schedule messages to send at specific times or recurring basis. Set reminders for important tasks and follow-ups.
items.title: Scheduled Messages and Reminders

items.description: Create and manage message templates for common responses. Support shortcut commands to insert templates.
items.title: Message Templates and Shortcuts

items.description: Comprehensive admin panel with organization management, user administration, activity logs, and statistics.
items.title: Admin Dashboard

items.description: Automated daily backups with point-in-time recovery. Support data export in standard formats for compliance.

items.description: Comprehensive audit logs for all user actions, system events, and security incidents. Support compliance exports for SOC 2.
items.title: Audit Logging

items.description: Bulk user import via CSV. Automated offboarding with message archive and account deletion.
items.title: User Provisioning and Deprovisioning

items.description: Usage tracking with seat-based or consumption-based billing. Self-service license upgrades and management.
items.title: License and Billing Management

items.description: Optional E2E encryption for sensitive conversations with key management. Support encrypted file transfers.
items.title: End-to-End Encryption

items.description: Support TOTP, SMS, and hardware security keys. Enforce 2FA for admin accounts and sensitive operations.

items.description: SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect support for enterprise SSO. Just-in-time user provisioning.

items.description: Detect and prevent sharing of sensitive data patterns (credit cards, SSNs). Support custom DLP rules.
items.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)

items.description: Restrict access to organization by IP ranges. Support dynamic IP lists for distributed teams.
items.title: IP Allowlisting

items.description: Native iOS app with push notifications, offline message queuing, and all core messaging features. Support biometric authentication.

items.description: Native desktop apps for macOS, Windows, and Linux with offline support and system tray integration.

items.description: AI-powered insights on communication patterns. Identify knowledge silos and recommend helpful channels.

items.description: Distributed architecture with load balancing across multiple servers. Support zero-downtime deployments.

items.description: Optimize queries with indexing, caching, and partitioning. Support horizontal scaling with database replication.

items.description: As a team member, I want to send a message in a channel so that I can communicate with my colleagues. Acceptance: Message appears instantly, shows delivery status, can be edited within 5 minutes.
items.title: User Story: Team member sends message in channel

items.description: As a user, I want to receive notifications instantly when someone messages me so that I do not miss important communications. Acceptance: Push notification within 1 second, desktop alert, sound option.
items.title: User Story: User receives real-time message notification

items.description: As a user, I want to format messages using markdown syntax so that my messages are more readable and expressive. Acceptance: Support bold, italic, code blocks, lists, links with live preview.
items.title: User Story: User formats message with markdown

items.description: As a user, I want to react to messages with emoji so that I can express quick feedback without writing a message. Acceptance: Emoji picker accessible, reactions visible on message, aggregated counts.
items.title: User Story: User reacts to message with emoji

items.description: As a user, I want to know who has read my messages so that I can track engagement. Acceptance: Show read status per message, display user avatars with timestamps.
items.title: User Story: User views message read receipts

items.description: As a user, I want to search through past messages so that I can find relevant information from previous conversations. Acceptance: Full-text search, filter by date/user/channel, saved searches.
items.title: User Story: User searches message history

items.description: As a user, I want to edit a message after sending it so that I can correct typos or clarify my message. Acceptance: Edit within 5 minutes, show "edited" label, preserve message history.
items.title: User Story: User edits sent message

items.description: As a user, I want to delete a message so that I can remove messages I sent by mistake. Acceptance: Soft delete with 30-day recovery, admin restoration, archive removal.
items.title: User Story: User deletes message with recovery

items.description: As a workspace admin, I want to create a public channel so that team members can discover and join relevant discussions. Acceptance: Set channel name, description, topic, visibility settings.
items.title: User Story: Admin creates public channel

items.description: As a team member, I want to join a public channel so that I can participate in team discussions. Acceptance: Discover channels, join with one click, receive welcome message.
items.title: User Story: Member joins public channel

items.description: As a channel owner, I want to manage channel members so that I can control who has access to sensitive discussions. Acceptance: Add/remove members, assign roles, manage permissions.
items.title: User Story: Owner manages channel members

items.description: As a user, I want to configure how I receive notifications from a channel so that I am not overwhelmed by notifications. Acceptance: All/mentions/none options, quiet hours, notification grouping.
items.title: User Story: User configures channel notifications

items.description: As a user, I want to search for channels so that I can find relevant discussions and join them. Acceptance: Search by name, description, member count, view suggestions.
items.title: User Story: User searches for channels

items.description: As a channel owner, I want to generate invite links so that I can invite external users to the channel. Acceptance: Time-limited links, one-time use option, custom expiration policies.
items.title: User Story: Channel owner receives invite link

items.description: As a user, I want to send direct messages to colleagues so that I can have private conversations. Acceptance: Start DM with any user, message history, typing indicators.
items.title: User Story: User sends direct message

items.description: As a user, I want to see if my colleague is online so that I know when they might respond to my message. Acceptance: Show online/offline/away status, last seen time, presence indicators.
items.title: User Story: User sees online status

items.description: Build real-time presence tracking with online/offline/away states using Redis.
items.title: Implement online status tracking

items.description: As a user, I want to create group direct messages so that I can have private conversations with multiple people. Acceptance: Add up to 20 participants, set group name, manage members.
items.title: User Story: User creates group DM

items.description: As a user, I want to reply to a specific message in a thread so that my response is connected to the original message. Acceptance: Thread view shows context, replies visible, nested organization.
items.title: User Story: User replies in thread

items.description: As a user, I want to be notified when someone replies to a thread I participated in so that I can follow the conversation. Acceptance: Auto-subscribe to threads I reply to, notify on new replies.
items.title: User Story: User receives thread reply notification

items.description: As a user, I want to mention a colleague by name so that they receive a notification about my message. Acceptance: @mention autocomplete, notifications sent, highlighted in messages.
items.title: User Story: User mentions colleague in message

items.description: As a user, I want to be notified when someone mentions me so that I can respond promptly. Acceptance: Instant push notification, separate notification category, history tracking.
items.title: User Story: User receives mention notification

items.description: As a user, I want to view all mentions I received so that I do not miss important messages. Acceptance: Dedicated mentions view, search by channel/user, mark as read.
items.title: User Story: User views all mentions

items.description: As a user, I want to upload files to channels so that I can share documents and media with my team. Acceptance: Drag-and-drop, progress indicator, virus scan, file preview.
items.title: User Story: User uploads file to channel

items.description: As a user, I want to preview files before downloading so that I can verify content without downloading. Acceptance: Image preview, PDF viewer, code syntax highlighting, video player.
items.title: User Story: User previews uploaded file

items.description: As a user, I want to share files with specific users so that I can control file access. Acceptance: Generate share links, set expiration, download restrictions, access logs.
items.title: User Story: User shares file with specific users

items.description: As a user, I want to search through uploaded files so that I can find relevant documents. Acceptance: Full-text search, filter by type/date/uploader, saved searches.
items.title: User Story: User searches uploaded files

items.description: As a user, I want to start a video call with a colleague so that I can communicate face-to-face. Acceptance: Click to call, notification sent, auto-accept option, call timer.
items.title: User Story: User initiates video call

items.description: As a user, I want to share my screen during a call so that I can show my work or demonstrate something. Acceptance: Share entire screen, specific app, or browser tab, pause sharing, quality selection.
items.title: User Story: User shares screen during call

items.description: As a user, I want to record calls so that I can reference the discussion later. Acceptance: Start/stop recording, consent from all participants, auto-transcript, storage in channel.
items.title: User Story: User records video call

items.description: As a user, I want to customize my profile with avatar and bio so that my colleagues know who I am. Acceptance: Upload avatar, set bio, add social links, timezone selection.
items.title: User Story: User customizes profile

items.description: As a user, I want to set a status message so that I can tell my team what I am working on. Acceptance: Set status text, emoji, auto-clear after time, schedule status.
items.title: User Story: User sets status message

items.description: As a user, I want to search for team members so that I can find and contact them. Acceptance: Search by name/email/department, view profiles, direct message from results.
items.title: User Story: User finds team member

items.description: Implement adding/removing members from group conversations with notifications.
items.title: Build group DM member management

items.description: As a workspace admin, I want to view analytics about workspace activity so that I can understand team engagement. Acceptance: Message volume, active users, channel growth, peak hours.
items.title: User Story: Admin views workspace analytics

items.description: As a workspace admin, I want to manage user accounts so that I can control access to the workspace. Acceptance: Create/deactivate users, reset passwords, assign roles, bulk operations.
items.title: User Story: Admin manages user accounts

items.description: As a workspace admin, I want to export workspace data so that I can backup and analyze team information. Acceptance: Export messages, channels, users in CSV/JSON, scheduled exports, encryption.
items.title: User Story: Admin exports workspace data

items.description: Test markdown parser with various formatting options and edge cases.
items.title: Unit Test: Markdown parsing

items.description: Test emoji reaction creation, deletion, and aggregation.
items.title: Integration Test: Emoji reactions

items.description: Test message edit validation, version tracking, and history preservation.
items.title: Unit Test: Message editing

items.description: Test searching messages with filters across multiple channels.
items.title: E2E Test: Message search

items.description: Test soft delete functionality with recovery within 30-day window.
items.title: Unit Test: Message soft delete

items.description: Test read receipt tracking and delivery per user.
items.title: Integration Test: Read receipts

items.description: Test typing indicator broadcasting and timeout.
items.title: Unit Test: Typing indicators

items.description: Test channel creation with required fields and validation.
items.title: Unit Test: Channel creation

items.description: Test channel access control based on membership and roles.
items.title: Integration Test: Channel permissions

items.description: Test full channel workflow: create, invite members, post messages, archive.
items.title: E2E Test: Channel workflow

items.description: Test JWT-based invite link generation and validation.
items.title: Unit Test: Invite link generation

items.description: Test Elasticsearch-based channel search with filters.
items.title: Integration Test: Channel search

items.description: Test direct message conversation initialization.
items.title: Unit Test: DM conversation creation

items.description: Test real-time presence tracking with Redis.
items.title: Integration Test: Online status tracking

items.description: Test group DM creation, member management, and messaging.
items.title: E2E Test: Group DM workflow

items.description: Test thread reply storage and retrieval with context.
items.title: Unit Test: Thread reply creation

items.description: Test subscription and notification delivery for thread replies.
items.title: Integration Test: Thread notifications

items.description: Test complete thread workflow with multiple replies.
items.title: E2E Test: Thread conversation

items.description: Test file type, size, and security validation.
items.title: Unit Test: File upload validation

items.description: Test file upload to AWS S3 with encryption.
items.title: Integration Test: S3 upload

items.description: Test ClamAV integration for file scanning.
items.title: Unit Test: Virus scanning

items.description: Test file upload, share, and download complete workflow.
items.title: E2E Test: File sharing workflow

items.description: Test Elasticsearch-based file search with metadata.
items.title: Integration Test: File search

items.description: Test JWT token validation and expiration.
items.title: Unit Test: JWT validation

items.description: Test authorization for all endpoints and resources.
items.title: Integration Test: Permission checks

items.description: Test parameterized queries and input sanitization.
items.title: Unit Test: SQL injection prevention

items.description: Send a message to a channel or direct message. Request: {channelId, content, threadId}. Response: {messageId, createdAt, status}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/messages

items.description: Retrieve messages from a channel with pagination. Query: {limit, offset, before, after}. Response: {messages[], total, hasMore}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/messages/{channelId}

items.description: Edit a message. Request: {content}. Response: {messageId, updatedAt, editedBy, editHistory[]}.
items.title: PATCH /api/v1/messages/{messageId}

items.description: Delete a message with soft delete. Request: {}. Response: {messageId, deletedAt, recoverableUntil}.
items.title: DELETE /api/v1/messages/{messageId}

items.description: Add emoji reaction to a message. Request: {emoji}. Response: {messageId, reaction, userCount}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/messages/{messageId}/reactions

items.description: Search messages with filters. Query: {q, channelId, userId, from, to, limit}. Response: {results[], total, facets}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/messages/search

items.description: Mark message as read. Request: {}. Response: {messageId, readAt}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/messages/{messageId}/read

items.description: WebSocket connection for real-time messaging. Events: message_created, message_updated, message_deleted, typing_indicator, read_receipt.
items.title: WS /ws/messages/{channelId}

items.description: Create a new channel. Request: {name, description, isPrivate, topic}. Response: {channelId, createdAt, owner}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/channels

items.description: List all channels with optional filters. Query: {search, type, limit, offset}. Response: {channels[], total, facets}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/channels

items.description: Get channel details. Response: {channelId, name, members[], settings, createdAt}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/channels/{channelId}

items.description: Update channel settings. Request: {name, description, topic}. Response: {channelId, updatedAt}.
items.title: PATCH /api/v1/channels/{channelId}

items.description: Delete or archive a channel. Request: {archiveMessages}. Response: {channelId, deletedAt}.
items.title: DELETE /api/v1/channels/{channelId}

items.description: Add member to channel. Request: {userId, role}. Response: {memberId, userId, role}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/channels/{channelId}/members

items.description: Remove member from channel. Response: {memberId, removedAt}.
items.title: DELETE /api/v1/channels/{channelId}/members/{userId}

items.description: Generate invite link for channel. Request: {expiresIn, oneTimeUse}. Response: {inviteCode, expiresAt, url}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/channels/{channelId}/invites

items.description: Get channel analytics and metrics. Response: {messageCount, activeMembers, peakHours, engagement}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/channels/{channelId}/analytics

items.description: Create direct message conversation. Request: {participantIds[], groupName}. Response: {conversationId, participants[], createdAt}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/dms

items.description: List user DM conversations. Response: {conversations[], total, unreadCounts}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/dms

items.description: Get messages from DM conversation. Query: {limit, offset}. Response: {messages[], total, hasMore}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/dms/{conversationId}/messages

items.description: Get user online status. Response: {userId, status, lastSeen}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/status

items.description: WebSocket for DM real-time messaging and presence. Events: message_created, typing_indicator, presence_changed.
items.title: WS /ws/dms/{conversationId}

items.description: Upload file with multipart form data. Request: {file, channelId, description}. Response: {fileId, url, uploadedAt, size}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/files/upload

items.description: Get file metadata and download URL. Response: {fileId, name, size, uploadedBy, uploadedAt, previewUrl}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/files/{fileId}

items.description: Delete a file. Response: {fileId, deletedAt}.
items.title: DELETE /api/v1/files/{fileId}

items.description: Generate share link for file. Request: {expiresIn, accessLevel}. Response: {shareToken, shareUrl, expiresAt}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/files/{fileId}/share

items.description: Search files with filters. Query: {q, type, uploadedBy, from, to}. Response: {results[], total}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/files/search

items.description: Reply to a message in thread. Request: {content}. Response: {replyId, threadId, createdAt}.
items.title: POST /api/v1/threads/{messageId}/replies

items.description: Get thread with all replies. Response: {parentMessage, replies[], replyCount}.
items.title: GET /api/v1/threads/{messageId}

items.description: Mark thread as resolved. Request: {resolved}. Response: {threadId, resolvedAt}.
items.title: PATCH /api/v1/threads/{messageId}/resolve

items.description: Core messaging table with id, channel_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at. Indices on channel_id, user_id, created_at. Full-text search index on content.
items.title: Table: messages

items.description: Channels table with id, workspace_id, name, description, is_private, topic, created_by, created_at, updated_at, archived_at. Unique index on (workspace_id, name).
items.title: Table: channels

items.description: File metadata with id, channel_id, uploader_id, filename, size, mime_type, s3_key, virus_scan_status. Indices on channel_id, uploader_id.
items.title: Table: files

items.description: User notifications with id, user_id, type, message_id, channel_id, created_at, read_at. Indices on user_id, created_at.
items.title: Table: notifications

items.description: Composable message input box with @ mentions, emoji picker, formatting toolbar, file upload, and typing indicator display.
items.title: MessageInput Component

items.description: Sidebar component showing all channels with unread badges, favorites, archived, and search functionality. Supports drag-to-reorder.
items.title: ChannelList Component

items.description: Header bar showing channel name, topic, member count, settings, and quick actions (pin, search, call).
items.title: ChannelHeader Component

items.description: Reusable avatar component with initials fallback, status indicator, tooltip on hover showing user info and quick action buttons.
items.title: UserAvatar Component

items.description: Emoji picker with categories, search, recently used, and skin tone support. Integration with message input and reactions.
items.title: EmojiPicker Component

items.description: Side panel showing thread conversation with parent message, replies, reply counter, and notification settings.
items.title: ThreadPanel Component

items.description: Top navigation bell icon with unread count badge, dropdown menu showing recent notifications, and mark-as-read actions.
items.title: NotificationBell Component

items.description: Component for previewing files inline: images (lightbox), PDFs, code (syntax highlighted), video (player), documents.
items.title: FilePreview Component

items.description: Profile card showing user avatar, name, status, bio, timezone, and quick action buttons (message, add to channel, view profile).
items.title: UserProfileCard Component

items.description: Sidebar for direct messages with recent conversations, online indicators, unread count, and search.
items.title: DirectMessageList Component

items.description: Advanced search input with type-ahead suggestions, filters (channel, user, date), and saved search display.
items.title: SearchBar Component

items.description: Floating menu on message hover for adding reactions with emoji picker integration.
items.title: ReactionSelector Component

items.description: Animated component showing "John is typing..." with animated dots. Automates timeout after inactivity.
items.title: TypingIndicator Component

project_metadata.description: Enterprise team collaboration platform with real-time messaging, channels, and integrations
